sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56636" key="kentrobarika/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κεντρο-βᾰρικά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, title of a treatise of Archimedes <sense id="n56636.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on the centre of gravity: problems relating to this subject</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:543:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">543.30</biblScope> </bibl>: <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἡ -κή</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">theory of the subject, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:3:168" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.168</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
